THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROBSON, GARY ROBSON, GLYNIS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOSHI, PAYAL JOSHI, SHIVAM ASHWINKUMAR $2,940.00 PRINCIPAL, $155.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,095.00, THE JUDGMENT IS ALLOCATED AS FOLLOWS: $390.00 FOR PARAMEDIC FEES; $750.00 FOR GLYNIS ROBSON FOR GENERAL PLUS SPECIAL DAMAGES FOR BODILY INJURY; $1750.00 TO GARY ROBSON FOR GENERAL AND SPECIAL DAMAGES FOR BODILY INJURY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
JUDGEMENT DEBTORS REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGEMENT RETURNED. FORM WAS SIGNED BY CSAA CLAIM ADJUSTER SCOTT SHUMAKER NO FRONT/BACK COPY OF CHK.
